svg.aria-label: Defensibility packet artifact: structured evidence bundle with threat model, boundary analysis, failure classification, mitigation priority, and gate decision
svg.text: CRISISCORE SYSTEMS · PAINTRACKER
DEFENSIBILITY PACKET — EXECUTION SNAPSHOT
CLASS: TRUST/SEC
STATUS: PASS-WITH-FOLLOWUP
Scope: Trust-hardening verification sweep
Owner: Kay + Copilot execution pass
§1 SYSTEM INTENT
Primary: local-first chronic pain tracking, privacy-preserving records,
user-controlled exports for WorkSafeBC + clinical workflows.
Safety: predictable access to panic/grounding + crisis-support
controls under variable cognitive capacity.
Audience: engineering verification + operational trust evidence.
New attack surface introduced: NONE this pass.
§2 TOP 10 RISKS [severity: C=critical H=high M=medium]
R-01 [H] At-rest key material accessible to malicious extension
R-02 [H] Export bypass channel via crafted import payload
R-03 [H] XSS origin gaining plaintext Class A via devtools
R-04 [C] Coerced unlock — no in-app duress signal mechanism
R-05 [M] SW route-level registration warning (unsupported MIME)
R-06 [M] Optional weather integration leaks location if misconfigured
R-07 [M] Audit log verbosity — error traces may approach Class B
R-08 [L] Outdated dependency — addressed by npm audit gates
R-09 [L] PDF export metadata — not currently stripped
R-10 [L] WorkSafeBC form auto-fill may pre-populate stale entries
[additional items withheld — internal review scope]
Risk count: 10 active | 4 mitigated this pass | 2 deferred
§3 BOUNDARY VIOLATIONS — THIS PASS
BV-01 NONE: No new egress channels introduced.
BV-02 NONE: No Class A data touched in migration this pass.
BV-03 WARN: SW route-local registration warning — resources
sub-route logs unsupported MIME type 'text/html' for sw.js
→ classification: non-blocking / follow-up required
Privacy gates passed: npm run -s check-security ✓
Analytics consent protections: ✓ (monetization-boundary.test)
§4 FAILURE MODE CLASSIFICATION
ID CATEGORY SEVERITY REVERSIBLE CONTAINABLE STATUS
FM-01 Data leakage HIGH NO YES Mitigated (privacy gates)
FM-02 Unlock bypass CRITICAL NO NO Open — human review required
FM-03 Offline failure MEDIUM YES YES Mitigated (offline-queue.test)
FM-04 Export overshare MEDIUM YES YES Monitored (export modal controls)
§5 BUILD + RUNTIME RECEIPTS
cmd: npm run -s check:quick
res: PASS (after remediation)
cmd: npm run -s check-security
res: PASS (privacy gates + analytics gate)
cmd: npm run -s e2e:smoke
res: 6/6 tests PASS
obs: SW registration warning on resources sub-routes
→ unsupported MIME 'text/html' for sw.js [FOLLOW-UP]
unit: 42 security-relevant tests PASS
seo: 13 SEO consistency tests PASS
§6 MITIGATION PRIORITY
PRIORITY REF ACTION OWNER
P1 CRIT R-04 Duress/coercion signal mechanism human review
P1 CRIT FM-02 Unlock bypass — red zone human review
P2 HIGH R-01 Key material extension exposure review sec lead
P2 HIGH R-02 Import payload boundary hardening sec lead
P2 HIGH R-03 XSS plaintext window — devtools exposure sec lead
P3 MED R-05 SW MIME type warning — resources route eng
P3 MED R-06 Weather integration location leak review eng
P3 MED R-07 Audit log verbosity — Class B boundary eng
P4 LOW R-08 Dependency hygiene — ongoing npm audit automated
P4 LOW R-09 PDF metadata strip on export eng
P4 LOW R-10 Stale entry pre-fill guard — form export eng
[additional items redacted — scope boundary]
PLS SCORE (provisional): Reversibility 3/4 · Exposure Min 3/4 · Local Auth 2/4 · Auditability 3/4
Composite: 11/16 Threshold for release: ≥ 12 → PASS WITH FOLLOW-UP
ref: docs/trust/pls-rubric.md · ref: docs/trust/release-gating-policy.md
§7 GATE DECISION
⚠ PASS WITH FOLLOW-UP
Required before release: (1) Investigate + resolve SW route warning · (2) Observer-based coercion drill
(3) Human review sign-off on FM-02 (unlock bypass) · (4) Rerun check:quick + e2e:smoke after follow-ups
Remediation applied this pass: DataRestore.tsx callback normalized · Malformed artifact files removed from artifacts/devto/
Sign-off: pending reviewer confirmation · ref: docs/trust/release-evidence-2026-03-12.md
